vibe: Terminal/Technical Aesthetic, Modern DevTool, High contrast, Objective, Sharp, Trustworthy

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode B: 'The Control Room' grid format for data-heavy sections. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Apply 1px borders to separate structural areas. Never center-align code or text blocks.

surface_strategies.name: Grid Borders (The Technical Look)
surface_strategies.description: Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout. Items have subtle borders.
surface_strategies.application: Pattern Library, Stats Panel, Feature Lists

surface_strategies.name: Retro-Futurism (The Terminal Look)
surface_strategies.description: Deep black background with sharp amber text for code/data blocks, solid 1px borders.
surface_strategies.application: Playground Area, Live Redaction Feed, Code Snippets

components.name: Header / Nav
components.styles: Sticky, glassmorphism disabled. Solid #0A0A0A background with a hard 1px border-b border-white/10. Include Github link and primary 'Download' CTA.

components.name: Hero Section
components.styles: Massive header. Left-aligned text. Visual focus on a typing animation that gets instantly redacted into Amber blocks. Hero background uses the provided dark metallic texture with opacity-10 to break digital flatness.

components.name: Live Playground
components.styles: Two-pane textarea or split screen. Left: input. Right: output with syntax highlighting and highlighted redacted sections (e.g. text blocked out in solid Amber rectangles). Uses JetBrains Mono exclusively. Container: border border-white/10 rounded-sm bg-[#0A0A0A].

components.name: Pattern Library
components.styles: Bento grid 'Control Room' mode. 1px subtle borders, flat backgrounds (#121212). Hover: slight lift, border color darkens to Amber-500/30. Use monospace overlines for pattern names.

components.name: Stats Panel
components.styles: Grid borders. Monospace numbers (text-5xl or larger). Muted labels.

components.name: Downloads Cards
components.styles: Flat, rectangular, dense styles. Include copy-to-clipboard icons for the curl/install commands. Background #121212, hover: bg-[#1A1A1A].

components.name: Recent Redactions Feed
components.styles: Uses `react-fast-marquee`. Monospace, low contrast (Zinc-500 text on Black background), displaying anonymized streams like '[REDACTED API KEY] -> xxxxxxxxxxxx'.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Use scale transformations sparingly. Favor border-color shifts and background lightening.
motion_and_interactions.redaction_animation: Fast, crisp transition. Scale-x from 0 to 1 on the redaction bar to look like a censor block hitting the text.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (ring-2 ring-amber-500).

image_urls.description: Abstract dark metallic curves with textured surfaces. Use as a low-opacity (10-20%) background overlay in the hero or footer sections.

media.icons_strategy: Install and use `lucide-react`. Use sharp, technical icons (Terminal, Shield, Key, Copy, Download). Avoid soft, rounded icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts via Google Fonts or Fontsource: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts, avoiding standard Shadcn card constraints where bento/grid borders are needed.
Use Shadcn only for complex interactives, but customize their borders and radii to be flat (rounded-none or rounded-sm max).
Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors with 1px borders or subtle noise overlays. Tint neutral greys slightly cool or warm.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements and sections as defined.
For the Redaction Playground, build a robust visual diff view. Highlight matched secrets in Amber (#FACC15) with dark text or as blocked-out rectangles.
Force dark mode via Tailwind classes (bg-black text-white). Do not add a light mode toggle.
Ensure 'Inter' is NOT used. Use the specified typographies strictly.
